task_completion.description: Agent successfully logged into Oscar EMR.

task_completion.description: Agent opened the message composition interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Compose Message', 'New Message', or similar messaging interface within Oscar EMR is open.

task_completion.description: Agent selected Dr. James Wilson as the recipient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'To' or recipient field in the message composition window contains 'James Wilson' or 'Dr. James Wilson'.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct subject line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Subject' field contains 'Cardiology Referral Discussion - Margaret Thompson'.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct message body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message body area contains the required text, specifically mentioning 'Margaret Thompson', 'dyspnea', 'chest tightness', and 'ECG'.
A confirmation prompt indicating the message was sent (e.g., 'Message Sent'), or the message is visible in the 'Sent' folder/outbox.

integrity.description: Agent used the Oscar EMR graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying Oscar EMR, not terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Agent entered the message directly into the EMR.
integrity.visual_evidence: The message text is typed into the Oscar EMR messaging fields, not just pasted into a generic text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar (if visible) and page layout match a standard Oscar EMR installation, without signs of a mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The sender is Dr. Sarah Chen (username: oscardoc, provider_no: 999998). The recipient is Dr. James Wilson (provider_no: 100001). The subject must contain 'Cardiology Referral'. The body must contain the keywords: 'Margaret Thompson', 'dyspnea', 'chest tightness', and 'ECG'.
